children.name: p
children.textContent: Fixing items reduces 73% more waste than recycling them.

children.name: p
children.textContent: 8 million metric tons of plastic enter oceans yearly. Every swap helps.

children.name: p
children.textContent: One swap prevents avg. 2.3kg CO₂ vs buying new.

children.name: p
children.textContent: Communities with active swapping cut household waste by 40%.
